title: Locksmiths and Safe Repairers
description: Repair and open locks, make keys, change locks and safe combinations, and install and repair safes.

tasks.text: Cut new or duplicate keys, using impressions or code key machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Insert new or repaired tumblers into locks to change combinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move picklocks in cylinders to open door locks without keys.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut new or duplicate keys, using key cutting machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and maintain master key systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install door hardware, such as locks and closers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of company locks and keys.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Disassemble mechanical or electrical locking devices, and repair or replace worn tumblers, springs, and other parts, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and adjust safes, vault doors, and vault components, using hand tools, lathes, drill presses, and welding and acetylene cutting apparatus.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install alarm and electronic access systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install safes, vault doors, and deposit boxes according to blueprints, using equipment such as power drills, taps, dies, truck cranes, and dollies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove interior and exterior finishes on safes and vaults, and spray on new finishes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
